name: GIGABYTE Q670M D3H Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel Q670 Chipset - Supports DDR5-5600(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - D-Sub - 2x DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.0 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - Intel GbE LAN - Intel 2.5G LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE Q670M D3H Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel
description: Intel Q670 micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket and DDR5 support for workstations.
